## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/spacecode/spacebridge/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have made sure pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] I have formatted my code with `ruff format`
- [ ] I have checked my code with `ruff check`
- [ ] I have run type checking with `mypy`
